---
title: 'START HERE'
date: '2022-05-24T16:36:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Sunrise Scentworks'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '6794749418529228476'
blogger_filename: '/p/start-here.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Sunrise Scentworks/feed.atom'
---

<h3 style="text-align: left;">Teaching you to make your own handcrafted soaps and candles, for yourself, your family, or your own small business.&nbsp;</h3><p><br /></p><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20211105-200620-a05164f775e8.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="3456" data-original-width="4608" height="300" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20211105-200620-3d534991c000.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><p>It's the smell that draws you in. You see the handcrafted soaps and candles in a local botique shop or at a farmers' market, and you can smell them wafting in the air just feet from the table.&nbsp;</p><p>Before you know it, you have pulled out your wallet and purchased a bundle becuase you needed options!&nbsp;</p><p></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>What if you could make them yourself? Better, what if you could be the one supplying the store with them?</li><li>Have you always loved the smell of handcrafted soaps and candles and wish you could make them yourself?</li><li>Have you considered a soap and candle making business, but don't know where to start?&nbsp;</li></ul><p></p><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20211016-122127-e8809b6e862b.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="3456" data-original-width="4608" height="300" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20211016-122127-e22ff0f76bf3.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><h4 style="text-align: left;"><br /></h4><h4 style="text-align: left;">Handcrafting Soaps and Candles from Scratch</h4><p>Making soaps and candles for yourself or your own small business can feel complicated. It can feel overwhelming to learn a skill largely lost to our our fast-paced modern culture of grocery store stops and Amazon purchases.&nbsp;</p><p>If you've tried to look into this yourself already, you may have been inundated with chemicle labels you didn't understand, scent options that left you confused, and warning labels that sounded scary.&nbsp;</p><p>You are not alone, many others have felt the same way.&nbsp;</p><div><br /></div><h4 style="text-align: left;">Let me teach you how to become a Soap and Candle maker</h4><p>Hi, my name is Jen and I've been mentoring Soap and Candle makers for over 28 years. I've been a featured contributing writer to "Making Soap - Cosmetics &amp; Candles" magazine. I will walk you through step-by-step from knowing nothing, to having your very own Soaps and Candles.</p><p></p><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/received-269403640849044-ec799a6b1ad7.jpeg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="3640" data-original-width="2720" height="400" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/received-269403640849044-f3f1629f1938.jpeg" width="300" /></a></div><p>As a bonus, for those of you want your own small business, I will walk you through the process of finding markets and venues, putting together a media package for set-up in local stores, and help you avoid the mistakes I made when I first started out.&nbsp;</p><p></p><p></p><p>Whether you want a small business or just want to start making them for youself and your family, I will be your tour guide and make this process simple.&nbsp;</p><h4 style="text-align: left;">Subscribe now</h4><p></p><div>Get your free guide "17 Things I Wish I Knew Before Starting My Soap and Candle Business", which has both maker tips and business tips every maker should know.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>You'll also be joining my email list for occassional updates, behind the scenes stories, and special tips from Sunrise Scentworks.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>*Email list here*</div>
